name: detective-agentic-mysteries
description: A 2D AI-powered detective game where every NPC is an independent AI agent. Built with Phaser 3, Express, and the GitHub Copilot SDK.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && echo 'Bumped patch version'
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && echo 'Bumped minor version'
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && echo 'Bumped major version'
